◎译　　名　火线之下
◎片　　名　Under the Wire
◎年　　代　2018
◎产　　地　英国
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　英语

◎编　　剧　克里斯·马汀 Chris Martin
◎主　　演　玛丽·科尔文 Marie Colvin


◎简　　介  

　　On 13 February 2012, two war-correspondent Marie Colvin and photographer Paul Conroy entered war-ravaged Syria to cover the plight of civilians trapped in besieged Homs, under attack by the Syrian army. Only one of them returned. Based on Conroy’s book Under the Wire, the film is a gripping account of the triumph of the human spirit in the face of overwhelming adversity.

◎获奖情况  

　　第21届英国独立电影奖(2018)
　　最佳纪录片(提名)
introduction: On 13 February 2012, two war-correspondent Marie Colvin and photographer Paul Conroy entered war-ravaged Syria to cover the plight of civilians trapped in besieged Homs, under attack by the Syrian army. Only one of them returned. Based on Conroy’s book Under the Wire, the film is a gripping account of the triumph of the human spirit in the face of overwhelming adversity.
